items.title: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy
items.dek: Russians have been hit by mobile internet shutdowns and more businesses are seeking to dodge tax after more than four years of war with Ukraine.
items.body: Russians have been hit by mobile internet shutdowns and more businesses are seeking to dodge tax after more than four years of war with Ukraine.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli plan to use crocodiles to secure prisons holding Palestinians

items.title: Private jets flock to Montana - but locals can't afford the trailer park
items.dek: Rents in Bozeman, Montana have skyrocketed as wealthy out-of-towners flock to the city to experience the American West.
items.body: Rents in Bozeman, Montana have skyrocketed as wealthy out-of-towners flock to the city to experience the American West.
items.author: IriLine Desk
